finding_results.notes: Replaced abstract montage placeholders with embodied beats showing action, sensory detail, and consequence: family-lie economic payoff, relapse physiology plus missed sponsor calls, and a concrete relapse-cost beat in the ending pass.

finding_results.notes: Drafting loops now escalate through external pressure and forced choices: institutional legal threat, housing ultimatum with partial-payment sacrifice, irreversible interview-send action, sponsor intervention with a hard boundary, and constrained interview confirmation window.
Paternity line now includes explicit evidentiary status (no DNA, amended birth record, or sworn filing) and immediate embodied/behavioral fallout (blood-taste reaction and counsel-review flag).

summary: All three structural/craft findings were resolved with targeted in-place edits that increase embodied consequence, restore momentum through external pressure and irreversible choices, and sharpen paternity uncertainty with legal specificity plus lived impact.
